phases.title: Sort completed items by completedAt descending
phases.description: In KanbanBoard.tsx, add a .sort() call on recentIssues before .slice(0, 8) to sort completed items by completedAt in descending order (most recently completed first).
phases.verification: Build the project with pnpm typecheck to verify no type errors. Visually confirm the sort logic sorts descending by completedAt.
